channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: $6.3k/month: How I escaped local pay
item.description: I raised my net rate 3.5× in 18 months using fixed-scope packages and public case studies. Net income jumped from $1,800 to $6,300 with 50% from international clients. Learn the exact packages, benchmarks, and tools that made the difference.

item.title: Decode repo context before AI does
item.description: Cut AI PR error rates 60% by measuring what LLMs miss in your repo — ADRs, type hints, and coupling graphs before trusting autocomplete. Learn what to instrument first.

item.title: AI pay boost: prompt vs fine-tune — the 2026 data
item.description: Cut AI costs 65% and raise salary 25%: prompt vs fine-tune in 2026 with real benchmarks, salary ranges, and the one mistake that erases both.

item.title: From LeetCode to live systems
item.description: Self-taught devs waste months on LeetCode drills. Build a $10/month system instead. FastAPI 0.111 + PostgreSQL 16 + Redis 7.2 examples, latency benchmarks, and hiring outcomes.

item.title: AI-first systems: 3 patterns that don’t collapse
item.description: Cut AI API costs 40% with prompt caching, staged pipelines, and cost-aware retries — the patterns that actually survive production for solo founders.

item.title: Build cellular-aware backends in 2026
item.description: Build cellular-aware backends: atency by 42 % on the emulated rural link. T. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Pick one platform: Andela vs Toptal vs Arc in 2026
item.description: Compare Andela vs Toptal vs Arc in 2026 with real latency, payout, and take-home numbers for African developers — choose the right platform in 45 minutes.

item.title: Spot what LLM pipelines miss
item.description: proved to 65%, saving approximately $800/mo with LLMs — that the complexity of chaining these models with o.

item.title: Senior devs flee: 4 invisible Big Tech traps
item.description: Cut attrition risk 19% by measuring 4 hidden drags — meetings, PR size, MTTR, lead time — using only Slack, GitHub, and PagerDuty APIs. Learn the real reasons senior devs leave and the metrics that predict it.

item.title: Skip Message Queues: When Simplicity Wins
item.description: Message queues can decouple services, but they add latency and complexity. Learn when to use RabbitMQ, Kafka, or SQS — and when to skip them entirely.

item.title: Negotiate remote pay across borders effectively
item.description: Learn to negotiate a remote salary from a lower-cost country. Use market data, position your value, and handle client pushback to land better pay.

item.title: Startup mistakes: when fancy tech delays the real product
item.description: Cut development time 75% by removing Redis, Kafka, and Lambda — the over-engineered API that cost $180/month and 8 weeks of work, replaced with FastAPI and PostgreSQL for $38/month and 45ms latency.

item.title: Choose the right real-time protocol
item.description: Cut real-time latency 60% with the right protocol — WebSocket vs SSE vs polling benchmarks, code, and the one metric to watch first in 2026.

item.title: Ship 3 projects or stay unemployed
item.description: Build 3 micro-projects, not a polished SaaS — live demo, one metric, boring tech. Remote hires in 2026 respond to user impact over GitHub stars.

item.title: Bypass TypeScript strict mode
item.description: Cut TypeScript runtime errors 37% with two lines of config — when strict mode fails and how to plug the gap without slowing down

item.title: Database pools: size them right
item.description: Fix database connection pooling mistakes. Cut latency by up to 80%, avoid timeouts, and optimize for real-world concurrency with this practical guide.

item.title: 5 AI Tools Powering Self-Taught Developers
item.description: 7 AI coding tools empowering non-traditional developers to ship production-ready software. Detailed pros/cons, costs, and real-world results included.

item.title: Edge functions: the real cost and when they’re worth it
item.description: ate was 0.02% while Cloudflare’s was 0.008% with Edge functions cost they — scale to 100k requests per second during Black Frid.

item.title: Freelance rates: 2026 cheat sheet
item.description: Freelance developer rates 2026 cheat sheet — realistic numbers, real mistakes, and a step-by-step model to set your rate without guessing. Includes costs, market data, and a first-person breakdown of what went wrong.

item.title: Overbuilt stacks waste 40% of dev time
item.description: Cut API latency from 223 ms to 8 ms and AWS costs from $18k to $7.6k by replacing Kafka Streams and Redis cluster with a Node.js pipeline and single Redis instance — the real numbers and trade-offs.
